sections.heading: Overview
sections.content: The doc manager lets you browse, edit, and create DocJSON documentation files directly in the viz dashboard. No need to switch to a text editor for routine doc updates.

sections.heading: Quick Start
sections.content:
1. Click the **Docs** button in the top nav
2. Browse the folder tree on the left and click a document
3. Read the rendered content on the right
4. Click the edit icon on any section to make changes
5. Click **Save** when done

sections.heading: Features
sections.content:
### Browsing
- Folder tree with expand/collapse (state persists per session)
- Tag filtering: filter docs by tag
- Table of contents: auto-generated from section headings

### Editing
- **Section content:** Click the edit (pencil) icon to open a textarea. Edit markdown content and click away or press save.
- **Section headings:** Click a heading to edit it inline
- **Tags:** Add/remove tag chips at the doc or section level
- **Links:** Click the link icon to open the link picker. Search for cortex nodes and attach them to a section.
- **Sections:** Add new sections, remove existing ones, or reorder with drag handles

### Creating
- **New document:** Click the + icon in the toolbar. Choose a path and title.
- **New folder:** Click the folder+ icon to create a subdirectory
- **Import:** Import an existing Markdown file as DocJSON

### Special Features
- **Mermaid diagrams:** Sections containing mermaid code blocks get a diagram editor with Monaco syntax highlighting and live preview
- **Raw view:** Toggle to see the raw JSON source of the document
- **Wide mode:** Toggle for a wider content area (persists in localStorage)

sections.heading: Toolbar Actions
sections.content:
| Button | Action |
|---|---|
| Refresh | Re-scan docs directory from disk |
| New Doc (+) | Create a new DocJSON file |
| New Folder | Create a subdirectory |
| Wide toggle | Expand/collapse the content area width |
| Raw toggle | Show raw JSON source |
| Save | Save changes to disk (appears only when dirty) |

sections.heading: Tips & Troubleshooting
sections.content:
- **Unsaved changes warning:** The Save button appears only when you have uncommitted edits. Don't navigate away without saving.
- **Link picker returns no results?** The search uses the same 3-stage FTS as `cortex search`. Try shorter or different terms.
- **Mermaid diagram not rendering?** Check the code block syntax. The preview updates live as you type in the Monaco editor.
